title: Architectural Design of Compute and Storage Clouds
description: A layered flowchart showing the core components of cloud architecture and their interactions, illustrating how compute and storage services are integrated.
elements: Storage Service Layer (e.g., Object, Block, File)
relationships: The Client Layer requests services from the Management Layer
The Management Layer orchestrates resources from the Compute and Storage Layers
The Compute and Storage Layers are built upon and abstract the Physical Infrastructure Layer
